generated_assessment.reasoning: This person's very low Agreeableness (especially Trust at 16th percentile and Tender-Mindedness at 5th) combined with high Anger/Hostility (72nd) and conventional Openness (27th) fosters deep skepticism toward mainstream journalism, which they likely see as untrustworthy and out-of-touch with their values. The moderate Neuroticism and high Activity Level add a reactive, energetic distrust, but the lack of extreme ideological cues keeps the opposition at a clear but not maximal level.
